text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O and I are on our way<n>back to the
academy when...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Oh? And who might you be?

text_block_list.name: Girl in Pajamas
choice_data_list: (A child in pajamas? Alone out here?)

text_block_list.name: Girl in Pajamas
text_block_list.text: I-I really wanted to meet you, Opera O,but... but... Sniffle... sob...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ah-ha, no need for tears. While they<n>do glisten like
beautiful pearls, a smile<n>suits you so much better.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Hmm... She appears to be lost.

text_block_list.name: Girl in Pajamas
text_block_list.text: H-hic... O-Op... Um, Opera O...Sniffle!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
We'll need to calm her down first<n>before we can
help her.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I am honored to meet you, Princess!<n>Should you
have no prior<n>engagement...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Might I, the Overlord, be of service to<n>you as your
escort?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O holds out her hand, and<n>the girl stops
crying as she timidly<n>takes it. We should take her
to the<n>police station first.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Opera O agrees, but just as we turn<n>to go...

text_block_list.name: Nurse
text_block_list.text: Ah, there you are! I'm so sorry for<n>the trouble!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Oh... You are a nurse, I take it? Do you<n>know this
little one?

text_block_list.name: Nurse
text_block_list.text:
Y-yes... She's a patient at the—wait...<n>Aren't you
T.M. Opera O?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Oh? I see you know me. Well, of<n>course you would
have knowledge of<n>my name!

text_block_list.name: Nurse
text_block_list.text:
That girl is a fan of yours... and it<n>seems she
snuck off after finding out<n>Tracen Academy was
nearby.

text_block_list.name: Nurse
text_block_list.text:
You can't do that, understand? We<n>were all so
worried about you.

text_block_list.name: Girl in Pajamas
text_block_list.text: I... I-I... um... S-sorry... Hic!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I ask that you please excuse her just<n>this once!
My captivating beauty is to<n>blame.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: As an apology, I offer you a collectiblephotograph of myself—no! Ten copiesof my film, 24 Hours with You: AnOpera Anthology for you and every person at the hospital as well!

text_block_list.name: Nurse
text_block_list.text:
Oh, um... That's very nice of you, but,<n>well...
Anyways, thank you for looking<n>after her!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Sneaking out of a hospital alljust to meet me.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: How corruptible it is, this beauty of<n>mine!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Yes, from the joy of meeting me, and<n>from
reflecting on the hardship of her<n>solitary journey.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Cars and signage abound in this<n>place. Many a
thing must appear a<n>giant monstrosity to a child of
her age.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But she overcame her fears all for the<n>sake of
seeing me with her own<n>eyes.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Relief, joy, and a sense of<n>accomplishment surely
enveloped her<n>upon arrival... That is to say, those
tears were proof of her courage.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ahh! Such an admirable soul! I must<n>open my
heart to such purity!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Opera O comprehends the entire well<n>of emotion
behind the girl's tears.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
However! Sneaking away from a<n>hospital is an act
far too dangerous!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I must offer a gift that will both ease<n>her heart and
curb those impulses.
choice_data_list: How about you inspire her with your efforts?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: ...Indeed, that would be best.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: We must begin training right away,<n>Trainer!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I will create a short, two-hour piece<n>which can be
performed within<n>visitation hours. With me in the
starring role, it shall be an excellent<n>opera!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I manage to convince her that, instead<n>of an opera,
her brilliance on the<n>racetrack would be a better
gift.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: An excellent idea!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Then what are we waiting for? There<n>are
preparations to be made, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
For the photographs, of course! Her<n>album of me
will not fill itself!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Me during twilight, me under<n>starlight... Ah yes,
and me at dawn!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
And so, T.M. Opera O adamantly<n>insists that I help
with taking her<n>photos.
